differential_diagnoses: Common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with chronic opportunistic enteric infection
NK-cell lymphoproliferative disorder / Aggressive NK-cell leukemia
Small bowel adenocarcinoma arising in chronic inflammatory fistula
Multifocal gastrointestinal ischemic disease secondary to vasculitis
next_steps: Surgical consultation for urgent exploratory laparotomy or resection of ischemic/aneurysmal jejunal segments
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate for evaluation of NK-cell clonality and possible systemic malignancy
Full immunologic workup for hypogammaglobulinemia, including vaccine response titers (pneumococcal, tetanus) and B-cell phenotyping
Pathological examination of surgical resection specimen for lymphoma, infectious markers, and vasculitis
Computed tomography angiography to monitor for acute bowel ischemia or worsening aneurysmal changes
Repeat infectious disease consultation for evaluation of refractory Giardia in the setting of immunodeficiency
